testcase.name: duplicateCreateForAnActiveTargetReturnsTheExistingRun

2026-06-23T08:39:48.118+09:00 INFO 53343 --- [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table pipeline (id bigint generated by default as identity, active_target varchar(255) generated always as (case when status in ('DONE','FAILED','CANCELLED') then null else target end), created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, last_activity_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, status enum ('CANCELLED','DONE','FAILED','RUNNING') not null, target varchar(255) not null, type enum ('DELETE','INSTALL') not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table task (id bigint generated by default as identity, error_code enum ('CALL_TIMEOUT','CHECK_ERROR','EXECUTION_TIMEOUT','JOB_FAILED','TTL_EXPIRED'), execution_timeout bigint, fail_count integer not null, finished_at timestamp(6) with time zone, job_id varchar(255), kind enum ('CONDITION_CHECK','TERRAFORM_JOB') not null, max_fail_count integer, next_check_at timestamp(6) with time zone, operation varchar(255) not null, pipeline_id bigint not null, polling_interval bigint, ready_at timestamp(6) with time zone, seq integer not null, started_at timestamp(6) with time zone, status enum ('CANCELLED','DONE','FAILED','IN_PROGRESS','READY') not null, ttl bigint, version bigint, primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists pipeline drop constraint if exists uq_pipeline_active_target Hibernate: alter table if exists pipeline add constraint uq_pipeline_active_target unique (active_target) Hibernate: create index ix_task_pipeline_seq on task (pipeline_id, seq) Hibernate: alter table if exists task drop constraint if exists uq_task_pipeline_seq Hibernate: alter table if exists task add constraint uq_task_pipeline_seq unique (pipeline_id, seq) 2026-06-23T08:39:48.120+09:00 INFO 53343 --- [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-06-23T08:39:48.142+09:00 INFO 53343 --- [ main] c.b.p.create.PipelineUniquenessTest testcase.name: aNewRunIsAllowedForATargetOnceItsPriorRunIsTerminal
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into pipeline (created_at,last_activity_at,status,target,type,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into task (error_code,execution_timeout,fail_count,finished_at,job_id,kind,max_fail_count,next_check_at,operation,pipeline_id,polling_interval,ready_at,seq,started_at,status,ttl,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.active_target,p1_0.created_at,p1_0.last_activity_at,p1_0.status,p1_0.target,p1_0.type from pipeline p1_0 where p1_0.id=? Hibernate: update pipeline set created_at=?,last_activity_at=?,status=?,target=?,type=? where id=? Hibernate: insert into pipeline (created_at,last_activity_at,status,target,type,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into task (error_code,execution_timeout,fail_count,finished_at,job_id,kind,max_fail_count,next_check_at,operation,pipeline_id,polling_interval,ready_at,seq,started_at,status,ttl,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.error_code,t1_0.execution_timeout,t1_0.fail_count,t1_0.finished_at,t1_0.job_id,t1_0.kind,t1_0.max_fail_count,t1_0.next_check_at,t1_0.operation,t1_0.pipeline_id,t1_0.polling_interval,t1_0.ready_at,t1_0.seq,t1_0.started_at,t1_0.status,t1_0.ttl,t1_0.version from task t1_0 Hibernate: delete from task where id=? and version=? Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.active_target,p1_0.created_at,p1_0.last_activity_at,p1_0.status,p1_0.target,p1_0.type from pipeline p1_0 Hibernate: delete from pipeline where id=? Hibernate: delete from pipeline where id=?

testcase.name: aDifferentTypeCreateForAnActiveTargetReturnsTheExistingRun
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into pipeline (created_at,last_activity_at,status,target,type,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into task (error_code,execution_timeout,fail_count,finished_at,job_id,kind,max_fail_count,next_check_at,operation,pipeline_id,polling_interval,ready_at,seq,started_at,status,ttl,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into task (error_code,execution_timeout,fail_count,finished_at,job_id,kind,max_fail_count,next_check_at,operation,pipeline_id,polling_interval,ready_at,seq,started_at,status,ttl,version,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into pipeline (created_at,last_activity_at,status,target,type,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) 2026-06-23T08:39:48.165+09:00 WARN 53343 --- [ main] o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : SQL Error: 23505, SQLState: 23505 2026-06-23T08:39:48.166+09:00 ERROR 53343 --- [ main] o.h.engine.jdbc.spi.SqlExceptionHelper : Unique index or primary key violation: "PUBLIC.UQ_PIPELINE_ACTIVE_TARGET_INDEX_1 ON PUBLIC.PIPELINE(ACTIVE_TARGET NULLS FIRST) VALUES ( /* 5 */ 'ts-mixed' )"; SQL statement: insert into pipeline (created_at,last_activity_at,status,target,type,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,default) [23505-224] Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.active_target,p1_0.created_at,p1_0.last_activity_at,p1_0.status,p1_0.target,p1_0.type from pipeline p1_0 where p1_0.target=? and p1_0.status=? fetch first ? rows only Hibernate: select p1_0.id,p1_0.active_target,p1_0.created_at,p1_0.last_activity_at,p1_0.status,p1_0.target,p1_0.type from pipeline p1_0 where p1_0.status=? order by p1_0.id Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.error_code,t1_0.execution_timeout,t1_0.fail_count,t1_0.finished_at,t1_0.job_id,t1_0.kind,t1_0.max_fail_count,t1_0.next_check_at,t1_0.operation,t1_0.pipeline_id,t1_0.polling_interval,t1_0.ready_at,t1_0.seq,t1_0.started_at,t1_0.status,t1_0.ttl,t1_0.version from task t1_0 Hibernate: delete from task where id=? and version=?
